title: Plug Power Stock Is Already Up 92% in 2026. Its CFO Says Q2 Results Will Be Even Better.
text: Plug Power (PLUG) has experienced a remarkable rally, with shares climbing 92% year-to-date in 2026. The company's Chief Financial Officer Paul Middleton recently indicated that second-quarter performance will exceed first-quarter results. The hydrogen fuel cell company delivered impressive first-quarter earnings, with net revenue reaching $163.51 million, a 22.3% year-over-year increase that surpassed Wall Street expectations of $142.50 million. Key achievements included hydrogen fuel sales growing 22% year-over-year, hydrogen fuel margin improving by 54 percentage points, and adjusted net loss per share narrowing from $0.17 to $0.08. Middleton described the company as having reached an inflection point on margins and stated that second-quarter revenue is expected to increase sequentially from the first quarter. He also projected gross margin improvements quarter-over-quarter. Management targets 13%-15% full-year revenue growth, with the first half representing approximately 40% of annual revenue. The company expects positive operating income by 2027 and full profitability in 2028. Analysts maintain a cautious Hold consensus rating with a $3.19 price target, though some bull cases suggest upside to $7.
